businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), Garena (gaming), and Monee (fintech) ecosystem
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited operates e-commerce (Shopee), gaming (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) across Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Brazil. FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+35% YoY), net income $1.58B. Wednesday close $87.07 (-2.36%). Despite strong Q4, the stock plunged -18% on flat 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance and continued sliding. Simply Wall St: 'Despite -32% YTD decline, long-term value intact.' Market cap $51.55B, P/E ~34.5x, Forward P/E ~22x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Shopee (e-commerce): GMV-based fees + advertising — ~65% of revenue
Monee (fintech): Digital payments, lending, insurance — ~25% of revenue
Garena (gaming): Free Fire + licensed games — ~10% of revenue

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on EPS $2.52. Reasonable for e-commerce growth stock

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026E basis. Historical undervaluation given growth rate

growthDrivers.title: Seeking Alpha: 'Short-Term Pain for Long-Term Gain' — Moat Investment Phase
growthDrivers.description: Latest analysis (3/9): Buy rating at $95, target $136 (+56% upside). Margin pressure is strategic investment in long-term moats. Short-term pain worth enduring.

growthDrivers.title: YTD -32% Decline — Oversold Contrarian Opportunity
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/11): Despite -32% YTD decline, long-term value intact. Forward P/E ~22x with +35% growth is attractive.

growthDrivers.title: Google AI Partnership → Shopee and Monee AI Innovation
growthDrivers.description: 2/19 partnership with Google. Agentic AI shopping assistant for Shopee, AI-powered payment solutions for Monee planned.

growthDrivers.title: Net Cash $7.24B + FCF $4.51B — Financially Robust Even Under Pressure
growthDrivers.description: Strong financial position enables aggressive investment during competitive intensification. Financial advantage over competitors.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's #1 e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (Monee) + gaming (Garena) integrated ecosystem. Three-pillar synergy is the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee → ShopeePay → Monee lending closed loop. User lock-in through integrated services.
World's most downloaded battle royale. User acquisition → Shopee and Monee cross-conversion.
Localized operations across 10+ countries. Deep understanding of Southeast Asian regulations and culture.

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: Ride-hailing → fintech → e-commerce expansion. Smaller revenue scale

competitors.name: MercadoLibre (MELI)
competitors.detail: Latin America e-commerce leader. Competing with Shopee in Brazil

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: Alibaba's Southeast Asian e-commerce arm. #2 market share

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Rapidly growing social commerce. Encroaching on Shopee's Southeast Asian market

recentNews.headline: SE -2.36% — 'Long-Term Value Intact' Despite -32% YTD Decline
recentNews.significance: Simply Wall St: Current price undervalues long-term potential. The -32% decline may represent a buying opportunity.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Short-Term Pain for Long-Term Gain' — Buy at $136 Target
recentNews.significance: Margin pressure reflects moat-building investment. +56% upside potential long-term. Strong balance sheet highlighted.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Strong Buy — Rare Opportunity Created by Panic Selloff'
recentNews.significance: Net cash $8.73B, solid revenue growth, and long-term macro tailwinds support Strong Buy upgrade.

recentNews.headline: Sea Q4 2025: Revenue $6.85B, Net Income $397M — Guidance Disappointment Triggers -18% Plunge
recentNews.significance: Revenue and earnings solid, but flat 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance disappointed. Largest single-day decline since IPO.

recentNews.headline: Sea Partners with Google for AI — Shopee and Monee AI Integration
recentNews.significance: Developing agentic AI shopping assistant, AI-powered payments, and AI gaming experiences through collaboration.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 10 of 11 analysts rate Strong Buy. Average target $179.54 (+106% upside). Seeking Alpha latest target $136 (+56%). Post-panic selloff creating extreme undervaluation consensus.

risks.title: 2026 Shopee EBITDA Flat Guidance — Margin Expansion Stalling
risks.description: Price competition and moat investment expansion keeping 2026 Shopee EBITDA flat. Market interpreting margin expansion slowdown negatively.

risks.title: -32% YTD Decline — Downtrend Persists
risks.description: Largest single-day drop since IPO (-18%) followed by continued decline. 25% below 50-day SMA ($116), requiring time for trend recovery.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition Intensifying
risks.description: TikTok Shop's rapid social commerce growth in Southeast Asia threatening Shopee's market share.

risks.title: Southeast Asian Macro Risks
risks.description: Currency fluctuations, consumer slowdown, and oil price spikes from Iran conflict negatively impacting Southeast Asian consumption.

risks.title: Share Dilution +5.54% YoY
risks.description: High share count growth rate creating EPS dilution. Potential long-term shareholder value erosion.

buyReasons.title: 10 of 11 Analysts Strong Buy — Average Target $179.54 (+106%)
buyReasons.rationale: 2x+ upside potential from current price. Extreme disconnect suggests selloff was overdone.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E ~22x with +35% Growth — Value-Growth Intersection
buyReasons.rationale: Panic selloff compressed valuation to reasonable levels. PEG ~0.63.

buyReasons.title: 'Short-Term Pain for Long-Term Gain' — Moat Investment Value
buyReasons.rationale: Flat Shopee EBITDA reflects strategic investment against TikTok Shop competition. Short-term margin sacrifice for long-term market share defense.

buyReasons.title: Net Cash $7.24B — Strong Financial Safety Net
buyReasons.rationale: Top-tier financial stability even during decline. Ample capacity for aggressive investment and shareholder returns.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited closed Wednesday at $87.07 (-2.36%), failing to recover since the -18% post-earnings plunge on guidance disappointment, now down -32% YTD.

The key question is whether 'panic created an opportunity.' Simply Wall St argues the current price undervalues long-term potential. Seeking Alpha presents a 'short-term pain for long-term gain' thesis with a $136 target.

Forward P/E ~22x with +35% growth, $7.24B net cash, and a Google AI partnership — fundamentals remain solid. However, TikTok Shop competition and oil-driven Southeast Asian consumer slowdown pose near-term risks. RSI at 31.5 in oversold territory, awaiting technical rebound.

sources.name: Simply Wall St
sources.description: YTD -32% decline analysis, long-term value assessment

sources.name: Seeking Alpha Buy
sources.description: Buy $136, short-term pain for long-term gain

threads.hook: SE down -32% YTD 📉 but 10/11 Strong Buy?
threads.text: Sea Limited plunged -18% on guidance despite solid Q4. Now at $87 with 10/11 analysts rating Strong Buy, avg target $179 (+106%). RSI 31.5 oversold. Panic-created opportunity or value trap? 👉 investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-12

telegram.hook: 📉 SE $87.07 (-2.36%) — Down -32% YTD, but 'long-term value intact'?
telegram.text:
Largest single-day IPO-era drop (-18%) after guidance miss. Failed to recover, now -32% YTD at $87.

Simply Wall St: 'Long-term value intact.' Seeking Alpha: 'Short-term pain for long-term gain, Buy $136 (+56%).' 10/11 Strong Buy, avg target $179.54 (+106%).

Forward P/E 22x with +35% growth, net cash $7.2B. Google AI partnership bringing agentic AI to Shopee.

But: TikTok Shop competition + oil price surge risks. RSI 31.5 oversold territory.

Full analysis 👉 investory.kro.kr/stock/SE/analysis/2026-03-12
